Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for listing neural networks
Correction: The system shall list neural networks in a drop-down menu with each entry showing the network name and version.

Label: /FR-U-30/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for importing neural network topology
Correction: The system shall support importing neural network topologies in ONNX format only.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats only.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with the image, confidence score, and diagnostic data.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of error and warning messages
Correction: The system shall display error messages for invalid selections and warning messages for suboptimal configurations.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for checking arguments
Correction: The system shall check arguments for compatibility with the selected neural network and hardware component.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the run-time log file
Correction: The system shall save the run-time log file in a plain text format with timestamps for each event.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum dimensions for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum resolution of 224x224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the compatibility criteria for imported neural networks
Correction: The system shall ensure that imported neural networks are compatible with the selected hardware component.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall save inference results and diagnostic data in a structured JSON format.

Label: /TC-INF-10/
Issue: Does not specify the expected format for inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a structured format showing the image, confidence score, and diagnostic data.

Label: /TC-INF-20/
Issue: Does not specify the expected format for results with own neural network
Correction: The system shall display results in a structured format showing the image, confidence score, and diagnostic data for the imported neural network.

Label: /TC-INF-30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for viewing inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with the image, confidence score, and diagnostic data.

Label: /TC-INF-40/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting inference results
Correction: The system shall export inference results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

Label: /TC-ERR-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for invalid neural networks
Correction: The system shall display an error message specifying the reason for the invalid neural network import.

Label: /TC-ERR-20/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for missing hardware components
Correction: The system shall display an error message specifying the reason for the missing hardware component selection.

Label: /TC-ERR-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for invalid images
Correction: The system shall display an error message specifying the reason for the invalid image import.

Label: /TC-ERR-40/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for invalid images with previous imports
Correction: The system shall display an error message specifying the reason for the invalid image import and retain the previously imported valid image.
